summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. Missing test_artifact_cleanup.py (referenced in workflow pytest step), fixtures.json (referenced in workflow CLI step and run_act_tests.py COPY_FILES), and .actrc. The workflow WILL FAIL on "Run unit and workflow-structure tests" (FileNotFoundError) and "Run artifact cleanup dry-run" (fixtures.json not found). Task explicitly requires "All tests must be runnable and must pass at the end"—cannot verify. Individual script quality is solid (type hints, error handling, clear architecture in artifact_cleanup.py lines 24-306), but the system is incomplete. run_act_tests.py is well-structured but references non-existent files. actionlint validation not demonstrated. Not shippable.
